name: Add Left-Positioned Image to About Page Article
prompt: On our About page, add a photo of our team to the left of the 'Our Story' text. A placeholder image is fine.

setup.content:
---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about us"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Article
  heading="Our Story"
  paragraphs={[
    "We have been serving the community since 1995.",
    "Our team of passionate bakers crafts every loaf with care."
  ]}
/>

checks.judge: An image is added to the 'Our Story' Article section with imagePosition set to 'left', using a placeholder src and descriptive alt text; all existing heading and paragraph content is preserved unchanged

dry_run.text: I've added a placeholder team photo to the left side of the 'Our Story' section on your About page, with the text flowing to the right.

edits.content/pages/about.mdx:
---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about us"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Article
  heading="Our Story"
  paragraphs={[
    "We have been serving the community since 1995.",
    "Our team of passionate bakers crafts every loaf with care."
  ]}
  image={{ src: "/images/team-placeholder.jpg", alt: "Our team" }}
  imagePosition="left"
/>
